name: mac-mcp
description: Native macOS control via Swift + Cocoa: windows, Finder, clipboard, screenshots, notifications, and typed app automation. Code-signed for stable TCC grants. No raw shell or AppleScript exec.
long_description: A Claude Desktop Extension that exposes a typed, allow-listed surface for controlling macOS — built directly on AppKit, the Accessibility API, NSPasteboard, UNUserNotificationCenter, CGWindowList, and pre-compiled OSAKit scripts. Unlike shell-based alternatives, every tool is an explicit named function with a JSON schema; there is no run_shell or run_applescript escape hatch. The signed Developer ID binary gives Claude Desktop a stable TCC identity, so Accessibility and Automation grants persist across rebuilds.

tools.name: list_apps
tools.description: List running applications (bundle id, name, pid, frontmost).

tools.name: list_windows
tools.description: List on-screen windows with title, owner, pid, bounds, layer.

tools.name: focus_app
tools.description: Activate an application by bundle id or name.

tools.name: focus_window
tools.description: Raise and focus a specific window by id.

tools.name: move_window
tools.description: Move a window to (x, y) screen coordinates via Accessibility API.

tools.name: resize_window
tools.description: Resize a window to (width, height) via Accessibility API.

tools.name: set_space
tools.description: Switch to a Mission Control space by index.

tools.name: reveal_in_finder
tools.description: Reveal a file or directory in Finder.

tools.name: get_finder_selection
tools.description: Return the current Finder selection as an array of file URLs.

tools.name: set_finder_tags
tools.description: Set Finder tags on one or more files.

tools.name: quick_look
tools.description: Open Quick Look preview for a path.

tools.name: move_to_trash
tools.description: Move a file to the Trash (recoverable, not unlinked).

tools.name: spotlight_search
tools.description: Run a Spotlight (NSMetadataQuery) search and return matching paths.

tools.name: clipboard_read
tools.description: Read the system pasteboard as a typed value (string / image / file URLs / RTF).

tools.name: clipboard_write
tools.description: Write a typed value to the system pasteboard.

tools.name: notify
tools.description: Post a UNUserNotification to Notification Center.

tools.name: prompt_user
tools.description: Show a native input dialog and return the user's response.

tools.name: screenshot_screen
tools.description: Capture the main display (or a specified display) as base64 PNG.

tools.name: screenshot_window
tools.description: Capture a specific window by id as base64 PNG.

tools.name: mouse_move
tools.description: Move the mouse cursor to global (x, y).

tools.name: mouse_click
tools.description: Click at (x, y) with optional button, count, modifiers.

tools.name: mouse_drag
tools.description: Press, drag (capped at 4096 px/axis), release.

tools.name: mouse_scroll
tools.description: Send a scroll-wheel event in line or pixel units.

tools.name: key_press
tools.description: Press a single key or chord (named keys + modifiers).

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Type a Unicode string by posting key events (cap 10k chars).

tools.name: mail
tools.description: Mail.app: compose, search, list-unread (typed action enum).

tools.name: calendar
tools.description: Calendar.app: create-event, list-today (typed action enum).

tools.name: messages
tools.description: Messages.app: send, list-recent (typed action enum).

tools.name: safari
tools.description: Safari: open-url, get-tabs, run-js-on-active-tab (typed action enum).

tools.name: notes
tools.description: Notes.app: create, search, append (typed action enum).

tools.name: terminal
tools.description: iTerm2 or Terminal.app: open_window, run_command, send_text, get_active_text, list_sessions (typed target + action).

tools.name: iphone_mirror
tools.description: iPhone Mirroring (Sonoma+): launch, focus, type_text, screenshot, get_window. Tap via mouse_click on returned bounds.
